feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Repetitive manufacturing Profile
entry.content:
Repetitive manufacturing (REM) profile is one of mandatory master data for Repetitive manufacturing process. It controls how-to carry-on planning and confirmation in Repetitive manufacturing process.

 

However, REM profile could create through system configuration as per business process.

 

Configuration:

 

REM Profile has below mentioned sections.

  1. Control Data1
  2. Control Data2
  3. Movement types

 

Let’s discuss on Control data1.

 

GI backflush at GR posting – This check box control whether BOM components consume at the same time when goods receipt happens.

 

RP confirmations -This would use in case of Make to stock manufacturing and long lead time. Consumption of components could be recorded at a time that is close to time of operations to which it assigned. This help to calculate value of WIP products.

 

Reporting point could also use to manufacture with /without Kanban.

 

This is two types Mandatory Reporting point and Optional reporting Point.

 

Mandatory reporting point: This should use if quantity of production line, need to confirm along with each report point.

 

Optional reporting -This should use if quantity of production needs to confirm at the end of Production process.

 

 

Automatic GR Posting at Last RP when backflushing: This will control to do goods receipt during backflush of Last reporting point.

 

Process Control: This help separate below process from goods receipt. This could config under node of separate backflushing process.

                                            1.Goods issue

                                             2.Activity posting.

 

Error correction for Backflushing: This will generate backlog of errors during backflush of components.

 

 

Execute correction in dialogue mode: With this, system would ask to fix backflush error immediately during confirmation instead of generating entries in COGI.

With Mandatory option, this would not allow to goods receipt without fixing backflush errors.

With Optional option, it would generate pop-up with all backflush error. But that could skip and post confirmation. Then it would generate entries in COGI.

 

 

Let’s discuss on Control data2.

 

Planned order Reduction: Reduce planned order of material with production version and that of material without production version.

 

Reduction Period: This is calculated by adding the number of days you enter here to the backflush date. The system reduces all planned orders and run schedule quantities in the period of reduction.

 

Firming Logic:

With option “Always firm”- Update firming indicator in planned order which generate through Planning table.

 

With option “Do not firm”- Do not update firming indicator in planned order which generate through Planning table.

 

With option “Firm within plng time fence”-Update firming indicator in planned order if it falls with planning time fence of material.

 

Create planned orders when reversing: Will re-create planned order which were reduced during backflush, when reversing backflush.

 

 

Aggregate requirements: This will decide whether all dependent requirement of component grouped together to total requirement for a day when there is various requirement for that component on that day.

 

 

Movement type section has all movement types such as 261,262,131,132 etc.

entry.title: 自建表没有建立在psapsr3表空间上，而是被建立在psapsr3usr上，导致sr3usr表空间满了
entry.content:
如何设置才能让自建表不要建立在psapsr3usr表空间上。
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230 Technical error no. 72
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While Running time evaluation, i got this error

No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230
echnical error no. 72
1.09.2023 Processing terminated for EE 

It appeared after i made a new entry on  V_T510S.  I tried to make a new wage type selection rule since the wage type for overtime worked isnt showing on the payroll run, even thought the overtime quota number is recorded on the TIP table. 

Please help me solve this issue

Thanks, 

Kelvin

entry.title: Vendor Evaluation Process
entry.content:
Need some specific process or training document to understand the process for vendor evaluation process.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP NWBC: Fiori Launchpad exec transaction (Gui for Windows)
entry.content:
Hi All.

I try to make possible to open  classical transactions in GUI for Windows mode (not HTML) from Fiori Launchpad when I Use Netweaver Business Client

A made it in SAP S/4HANA 2021 and it works. Fiori Apps executing as Web and Transactions as Classical GUI.

However when I made same in SAP ECC 6.0 all transactions executing as WebGui. 
SAP_UI 7.40 SAP NWBC 7.7

entry.title: The General ledge balance and funds management commitment item balances are not matching
entry.content: The issue here is - not matching balances between FI and FM books for the fiscal year 2023. This issue has affected the books of company codes 0058 and 0059. In reference to our analysis, we see that client had posted manual journal entries in the last fiscal year to knock off the open goods receipt as they haven’t received the invoices in that particular fiscal year for few of the purchase orders. Later in the new fiscal year some of the open purchase orders were carry forwarded to the new fiscal year 2023. These manual entries posting and not carry forwarding PO on time may have created the issue of not balancing the FI and FM books. We tried reversing the manually posted journal entries that was posted for goods receipt to fix the issue of FI and FM balance but still there is no luck. Hence wanted to check if we can make direct entries to funds management to balance the amount between general ledgers and commitment or else is there  any other good solution to approach the situation here you had any situation in the past and had any solutions that helped you to fix this. Could you please assist if you have any solutions or steps to fix this issue.

entry.title: How to extend lines when copy and paste from Excel in ME51N
entry.content:
Dear expert,

Our users have multiple PR items in one PR and will copy content from Excel and paste in ME51N Item overview in Grid view). The question is each time system only allows to paste 10 lines.

Normally the user has more than 10 items (about 20 or 30 lines), is it possible to extend it?

 

ps. I got some clue in this thread 'ME51n Purchase Req screen adjustment'  

But if I untick the grid control in personal setting, some key field such as valution price is missing here.

entry.title: Rejected PR's commitments could be found in KOB2
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

In our system, we could find rejected PR's commitments in KOB2 report under layout 2SAP, this could be misleading information for some colleagues, how could we make these rejected PRs with their commitments disappear?

In our system the users are not allowed to set deletion flag by PRs, but we could set closed mark by quantities/dates, and I think it is also helpful when we could e.g. make the information of "rejected" displayed in KOB2 report for the rejected PRs.

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Error no. F5669 Posting date is initial in MB22
entry.content:
Hello,

I created a reservation with function BAPI_RESERVATION_CREATE1

When I enter MB22 to delete the reservation I getting an error Error no. F5669 Posting date is initial in MB22

I can see reservation date in RESB.

How I can delete this reservation? Why this happen?

entry.title: EWM x DM integration - PSA stock not read
entry.content:
Hi, 

I'm struggling with the DM x EWM integration. However it seems that my stock is staged in DM but I can't see the stock in the "manage stock floor" application. Any help / idea's? 

My assumption is that it would work out of the box.

(EDI via SOAMANAGER is configured correctly.)

entry.title: Where to store Malaysia Tax Identification number for e-invoicing in SAP ECC without BP
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone provide some insights as to where the Malaysia Tax Identification number should be stored in SAP ECC without Business partner? 

Tax category MY7 is recently introduced for this purpose but only applicable for S4. What about clients who are still on SAP ECC and not using business partner? 

Appreciate input.

Thank you.

Kind regards,

Winnie

entry.title: Wrong generation of final date of absenteeism quota from time evaluation (2006)
entry.content: When evaluating personnel times, the system is generating the wrong final deduction date, it is not entering 31129999. Has anyone had this problem?

entry.title: WZR archiving job is long running
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The archiving job for settlement documents(table WBRK, doc.cat. is B) is long-running. For 1000 entries it is running a day. 

Program name: RWLWRSMR

Archiving object: WZR

entry.title: IBD archiving deletion job iob is long running
entry.content:
Hi, 

The Inbound Delivery archival deletion job is long-running, it is running with program: S3LIKPDLS.

When it has 5000 deliveries it is running for almost 12 hours. 

Any suggestion to make the job faster.

Thanks,

Seenu

entry.title: MIGO error message: No availability control ledger active in company code as specified
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am getting the error message below on MIGO. 

No. GRANTMGT455: No availability control ledger active in company code as specified

I added a new plant and created a purchase order of NLAG material. When I try to post a good recipt, I get this error. If anyone knows which customizations are needed, could you give me a help?

Best regards,

Sakie

entry.title: Batch expiry date got changed after giving the UD
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are facing an issue with the batch expiry date. When the quality person gives the UD against the lot associated with the batch, the batch expiry date got automatically deleted and it set to blank. Can anyone help me why this is happening.

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE not work under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. Central system is Client( 100 ) of Development Server. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system. I attach our test senario. By the way, excel file cannot uploaded ? 

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

Best Regards,

entry.title: change company name & address
entry.content:
Hi Sap
my company has change name and address.

so i want to change that for all users in system


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system.

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Generate Intercompany Billing Request in SAP On-Premise System
entry.content:
Generate Intercompany Billing Request

 

Using the "Generate Intercompany Billing Request" App (On-Premise Systems):

This method is applicable to SAP S/4HANA systems. Here's how it works:

  • Open the SAP Fiori launchpad.
  • Search for and open the "Generate Intercompany Billing Request" app.
  • Enter the Sales Order number associated with the intercompany service or cost.
  • Click on the "Execute" button.

 

This process triggers the generation of a Debit Memo Request (DMR) document, which is the intercompany billing document in this context. The DMR can be sent for approval based on your configured workflow.

 

  1. Using the "Create Billing Document" (On-Premise Systems):

This method is commonly used in on-premise SAP systems and older versions of S/4HANA. Here's how it works:

  • Open transaction code Create Billing Document.
  • Select the Debit Memo Request related to the intercompany service/cost.
  • Click on the "Save" button.

 

This process generates an IDOC INVOIC (Output item - Invoice Receipt MM (RD04)). An intercompany journal entry is created (IBKPF (Document from IDoc)).

 

Important Notes:

  • Ensure you have the necessary authorization to access and use these functionalities in SAP.
  • Double-check the selected options and information to ensure accurate intercompany billing.
  • The specific configuration steps and terminology might vary slightly depending on your system version and customization.
  • Refer to SAP documentation or consult your system administrator for detailed instructions and guidance specific to your situation.

https://s4hclub.com/sap-library.html
